# Nurdai

> Strategic digital visibility studio structuring brands for search engines and AI systems (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews).

## About
Nurdai helps brands become discoverable and citable across traditional search and generative AI. Founded by Nurdan Çetin (Nurdai), specializing in AI Visibility, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), semantic SEO, and entity optimization.

## Core services
- AI Visibility & brand discoverability in LLM-powered search
- AI Visibility Audit
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- AI Search Optimization
- Semantic SEO & Entity SEO
- Digital Authority

## Publications & content
- Future of AI Search (LinkedIn Newsletter): https://nurdai.com/en/insights/future-of-ai-search

- Blog: https://nurdai.com/blog/
- Guest articles: https://nurdai.com/en/media
- Media center: https://nurdai.com/medya
